entries.value: Used to chop trees and clear wood from the farm.
Raw crafting material from ore nodes.
Used to mine rocks and ore nodes.
A fruit tree that yields apples each season.
Choose an action to continue interacting.
Sure, I will take the job.
Good. Come back when everything is ready.
Hey there! The field looks good today. Need me to show you a few things?
I need a few fresh carrots. Bring them to me and I will pay you fairly.
Good to see you again. I have a bit of field work if you have time.
A wild enemy with 60 HP suited for early combat loops.
A roaming orc warrior that attacks players on sight.

A wild enemy with 15 HP suited for early combat loops.

A roaming creature that attacks nearby players.
Processed from milk. Used in baking and risotto.
Processed from milk. Used in pizza and gratin.
Woven from wool. Used to craft protective clothing.
An animal product used in cooking or turned into mayonnaise.
Animal feed. Must be given to animals daily.
Processed from eggs. Sells for more than raw eggs.
Fresh milk used for recipes and cheese processing.
Foraged by pigs. An extremely valuable rare mushroom.
Refined oil from truffles. Extremely high value.
Produced by sheep. Woven into cloth using a loom.
Apple picked from a fruit tree. Great for cooking or profitable sales.
Asparagus harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Bean harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.

Cabbage harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Carrot harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Cauliflower harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Cherry picked from a fruit tree. Great for cooking or profitable sales.
Corn harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Cucumber harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Nutritious green vegetable. Used in garlic stir-fry and soups.
Crisp fall vegetable. Used for cabbage rolls or kimchi.
Tasty root vegetable. Used in soups and roasting.
Fall vegetable. Used for roasting or Eggplant Parmesan.
Core cooking ingredient. Used in over 10 recipes.
Fall fruit. Fermented in a Keg for high-value wine.
Common seasoning. Used in over 8 cooking recipes.
Most valuable fall crop. Used for soup or jack-o-lanterns.
Fresh wheat used for selling, cooking, or deliveries.
Garlic harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Grape harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Melon harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Pea harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Pear picked from a fruit tree. Great for cooking or profitable sales.

Yellow Pepper harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Plum picked from a fruit tree. Great for cooking or profitable sales.
Potato harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Radish harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Premium spring vegetable. Used in asparagus soup and stir-fry.
Valuable spring crop. Used in gratin and cream soup.
Fresh spring greens. Used in salads and sandwiches.
Versatile vegetable. Used for fries, soups, or Vodka.
Crisp and fresh. Used in salads and pickles.
Sweet spring berry. Used for jam, cake, or NPC gifts.
Beautiful spring flower. Used as NPC gift or dye.
A basic root vegetable. Used in soups and pickles.
Strawberry harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Juicy summer berry. Used for jam, juice, or baking.
Multi-purpose staple. Pressed into corn oil or roasted.
Refreshing summer fruit. Sells for high price or made into juice.
Tropical summer fruit. Used for juice, jam, or pizza topping.
Spicy and vibrant. Used in stir-fry or hot sauce.
Versatile ingredient. Used in salads, pizza, and sauces.
Key ingredient. Mill into flour for cooking.
Mild and colorful. Used in stir-fry or as a gift.
Tomato harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Fall fruit. Used for apple pie, vinegar, or juice.
Velvety spring fruit. Used for jam or NPC gifts.
Refreshing fall fruit. Used for juice and jam.
Sweet-tart summer fruit. Fermented into premium plum wine.
Turnip harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Wheat harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Deep red vegetable. Beet juice restores stamina fast.
Aromatic herb. Juice gives a speed buff.
Cool and crisp. Used in salads or pickles.
Quick-cook vegetable. Used in stir-fry or soups.
Nutritious winter green. Used in smoothies and soups.
Naturally sweet. Used for buttered baking or cake.
Rare winter bloom. Extremely valuable as an NPC gift.
Yam harvested from the field. Higher level crops sell for better value.
Cave bat wing. Used to craft lightning rods.
Fresh meat from a wild boar. Cooked into high-stamina meals.
Hard and sharp tusk. Used for decoration or selling.
Hard shell from cave crabs. Used to craft shields.
Light and durable feather. Used for arrow crafting or pillows.
Sharp claw. Used to craft mining charms.
Dropped by wild rats. Used to craft antidote.
Tough snake hide. Used to craft leather straps.
Rare venom. Used to craft powerful potions.
Immune to slow effect when moving in rain.
Apple cider vinegar. Used in cooking or sold.
Recovery drink. Restores 50 stamina. Grants 20 stamina/5 minutes.
A processed dairy food that restores stamina and sells better than raw milk.
Fragrant tea. Restores 15 stamina. Resists debuffs.
Stir-fried greens. Restores 50 stamina. Buffs +15% speed for 3 hours.
A rich egg-based food that restores a bit of stamina.
Premium aged plum wine. Extremely high sell value.
Premium soup. Restores 75 stamina. Buffs +10% max stamina for 1 day.
Quick stir-fry. Restores 45 stamina. Buffs +10% speed for 3 hours.
Sweet jam. Restores 30 stamina. Sells for high price.
Soft and sweet cake. Restores 65 stamina.
Exquisite delicacy. Restores 100 stamina. Buffs +20% max stamina for 1 day.
Healthy drink. Restores 40 stamina. Buffs +10% speed for 3 hours.
Fermented grape beverage. Sells for very high price.
Wild fall flower. Used to craft calming medicine.
Precious spring flower. Used as NPC gift or perfume.
Wild summer flower. Used as red dye and tea ingredient.
Rare winter bloom. Extremely valuable as an NPC gift.
Bright yellow bloom. Seeds used as a light snack.
Common forest mushroom. Restores 15 stamina when eaten.
Rare swamp mushroom. Processed into a speed potion.
Deep forest mushroom. Restores 20 stamina and removes debuffs.
Rare cave mushroom. Safe only after processing into medicine.
Clean and healthy mushroom. Used in cream soups.
Medicinal plant root. Used in potions and fertilizer.
Fuel for the furnace. Required for smelting ore.
Refined metal. Used for Tier 2 tools and basic sprinklers.
Tier 1 ore. Smelt into copper bars to upgrade tools.
Vegetable oil pressed from corn. Used for frying and cooking.
Rare gemstone. Used for lightning rods and lanterns.
Refined crystal fragment. Used in crafting.
Rare green gem. Used to craft luck charms.
Plant fiber from weeds. Used for rope and scarecrows.
Milled from wheat. Core ingredient for bread, cake, and pizza.
Precious metal. Used for Tier 4 tools and premium sprinklers.
Rare Tier 3 ore. Smelt into gold bars.
High-quality oak lumber. Used for building and crafting.
Sturdy metal. Used for Tier 3 tools and machines.
Tier 2 ore. Smelt into iron bars.
Natural sweetener from maple trees. Used in cooking and sold.
Resin from oak trees. Used as adhesive in machine crafting.
Sticky pine resin. Used for torches and waterproof adhesive.
Sturdy rope. A key material for many crafting recipes.
Brilliant red gem. Used for high-end jewelry or NPC gifts.
Sticky fluid gathered from defeated slimes. Used to craft automatic watering devices.
Birch lumber. Used for paper and decorations.
Basic building material. Used for furnaces and stone fences.
Milled from beets. Used in jam and baked goods.
Light oil from sunflower seeds. Used in cooking.
A fallen branch. Used as kindling.
Basic lumber from trees. Used for fences, chests, and tool upgrades.
A house bed used to end the day and begin the next morning fully rested.
Processes milk into cheese and butter.
Ferments wine, juice, and vinegar from produce.
Prevents lightning from damaging crops during storms.
Grinds flour, sugar, and oils from produce.
Protects crops in an 8x8 area from crows.
Place it to automatically water a small area every morning.
Place it to automatically water a larger field every morning.
More durable fence. Does not decay.
Basic fence. Marks the boundary of your farm.
Processed from milk. Valuable and useful in premium meals.
Daily chicken product. Can be eaten or processed into mayonnaise.
Processed from eggs. Worth more than selling raw eggs.
Daily cow product used for cheese.

Chops small trees in 1 swing. Unlocks deep forest.
Tills 1 tile per swing. Lets you plant seeds.
Tills 2 tiles at once. Saves stamina.
Tills 3 tiles at once. Very efficient.
Tills 5 tiles at once. Maximum efficiency.
A stronger pickaxe that mines faster than the starter tool.
Ancient Pickaxe tier 5. Deals 30 base damage at a stamina cost of 1 per use.
An upgraded scythe that harvests a wider area per swing.
Ancient Scythe tier 5. Deals 38 base damage at a stamina cost of 1 per use.
A basic sword for defending against monsters.

Defeat monsters and collect ore in the mine.
Defeat slimes and mine iron ore.
Defeat orcs and collect gold ore.
Overcome powerful monsters and collect crystals.
Defeat the mine boss and collect rubies.
Mine copper ore from the mine and deliver it.
Mine iron ore and deliver it.

Collect crystal shards from deep in the mine.
Collect rubies from the deepest mine floor.

A resource node that needs a proper pickaxe to mine gold ore.
The village blacksmith, crafting and upgrading tools.

A villager living in this town.
Hello, need to buy or sell something?
I sell livestock, animal feed, and buy barn products.

Can be mined with a pickaxe.

Keep farming, trading, and finishing quests to unlock the next step.
Rain will water crops for you. Use the time for mining or quests.

The sun is out and the field is dry. Water crops before the day ends.
Welcome to the farm. Check your tools, plant your first seeds, and learn the rhythm of the day.
After a few days, harvest crops, sell produce, and prepare supplies for the next trip.
Plant it to grow an apple tree.
What would you like to do?
Tip: Gather resources and upgrade tools to survive more easily!
Tip: Water crops every day so they keep growing steadily.
Tip: Bring the right tool when mining rocks, chopping trees, or cutting weeds.
Tip: Check your backpack before leaving the farm so you do not miss key items.
Tip: Save often to protect your progress.
Choose an item from your inventory to sell.
